channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Brazilian Influencer Robertinha Killed in Coelho Neto, Three Years After Partner's Death
item.description: Francisca Roberta de Jesus Silva, widely known as Robertinha, a 21-year-old Brazilian social media influencer, was tragically killed on May 14, 2026, shortly after returning to her hometown of Coelho ...

item.title: WMA Advocates for Standardised Public Measurements Across Tanzania
item.description: The Weights and Measures Authority (WMA) of Tanzania has recently highlighted the importance of having standard measurements in public areas to protect consumers and improve trade transparency. Accord...

item.title: Economic Challenges Persist Despite President Ruto's Requests to IMF
item.description: The article highlights that Kenya’s economic realities cannot be easily swayed by political authority, as emphasised by Githuku Mungai. President William Ruto previously indicated independence from IM...

item.title: Australian Court Confirms Fine on Elon Musk’s X for Failing Child Safety Rules
item.description: On Thursday, an Australian federal court don uphold fine of AU$650,000 (around US$465,000) against Elon Musk’s social media company, X. The matter concern how the company no follow Australian child in...

item.description: American photographer Nick DeWolf documented Boston during the winter of 1960, producing a remarkable collection of images that reflect both the charm and the harshness of the season. His photographs ...

item.title: Zsa Zsa Gabor’s Early Life and Career in the 1930s and 1940s

item.description: Alice Cooper, born Vincent Damon Furnier on February 4, 1948, is an iconic American singer and songwriter renowned for his raspy voice and theatrical performances. Originally the name of a five-member...

item.title: The 1950 Jaguar Mark V Drophead Coupe: Icon of British Post-War Automotive Design
item.description: The 1950 Jaguar Mark V Drophead Coupe represents one of the most refined examples of British luxury in the post-war era. Released at a critical time for Jaguar, the Mark V combined the elegance of pre...

item.title: Charity Event in 1982: Americans Smash Japanese Car to Support Laid-Off Steelworkers
item.description: In February 1982, a notable protest-cum-charity event took place in northern Indiana, where two American businessmen, Jim Coleman and Charlie Cobb, publicly destroyed a Japanese-made car. This act was...

item.title: ICC Registry Updates on Duterte’s Detention and Health Monitoring
item.description: Former President Rodrigo Duterte is currently being monitored under cell observation at The Hague due to his status as an elderly detainee, as per the International Criminal Court (ICC) Registry. This...

item.title: Eliud Kipchoge Backs Cape Town Marathon’s Bid to Join World Marathon Majors
